message:
feat: Continue replacing stub implementations

- callbacks.zig: Clarify thread-local context implementation is valid
- context.zig: Make current_context threadlocal for proper per-thread handling
- dynamic_attrs.zig: Add ScopeRegistry for dir() without arguments
- functools.zig: Enhance SingleDispatch with type registry and hash-based lookup
- mock.zig: Add PatchRegistry for tracking and restoring patched objects
